title: Eva 00 closest approximation of Adam
wikitext:
[]: Eva-00: closest "approximation" of Adam?             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Jul 10, 2009 5:55 am Typing up a post for another thread, a thought popped up in my head: if the Angels ultimate goal was a fusion with Adam, why didn't they try to fuse with the Evangelions, supposed replicas of Adam far more often? Unit-01 can be treated as an exception, since she supposedly has some "Lilith taint" within her, making her a not entirely perfect replica of Adam. But the Angels never tried to fuse with Unit-02 (kept for Kaworu, who used her as a possible backup), a supposedly uncorrupted duplicate of the First Angel. However, there is one Unit that the Angels gave a try, more than once: Unit-00. Not only Armisael, but also Bardiel tried to fuse with, or at least infect her. Bardiel had control of Unit-03's body, another supposed Adam replica and he also had Unit-02 disabled on the ground. Yet he didn't try to initiate fusion with 02, but when he got 00 on the ground, he immediately tried to infect her. The whole soul thing comes into play with this, in the sense that Unit-00 didn't have a complete Resident Soul, and thus, the Angels might have seen her as a more potent candidate for fusion. However, it is also a possibility that Eva-00 is the Eva that is genetically closest to the original Adam, and that the later production models were "modified" in certain ways. Thoughts? Also: I always wodered how can the Adam replicas, the Evas be dubbed "clones" of Adam, if they differ so wildly in appearance? Maybe Angel genetics are so funky, that two such creatures with the same makeup can have differing appearances? 


[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:26 am That is actually a really interesting and curious theory. However, it's often said that a replica can never be an exact copy of the original, and I suppose with Eva that'd have to be true. If you think about it, if they were exact copies, couldn't they go all "Giant of light" on us?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:40 am Agentomega wrote: If you think about it, if they were exact copies, couldn't they go all "Giant of light" on us?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:43 am SaltyJoe wrote: Well, i guess they would have to have an S2 organ for that. Which brings us to another question: why don't the "normal" Evas have an S2? Growth blocking? Surgical removal?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 10, 2009 1:39 pm I felt it was pretty clear that Unit 00 was always the target because both it and it's pilot have Lilith's soul, which must "feel" like Adam's. Adam-ish body plus Adam-ish soul = MOMMY! Adam-ish body plus Kyoko or whoever the fuck = M-...mommy? Um... notice Iruel, the 11th Angel, infects the Test Body Eva that Rei was using first. Was that a perfect Adam clone too?

[]: Re: Eva-00: closest "approximation" of Adam?             Quote Post by VoidEater » Fri Jul 10, 2009 2:29 pm ^Clever... SaltyJoe wrote: if the Angels ultimate goal was a fusion with Adam, why didn't they try to fuse with the Evangelions, supposed replicas of Adam far more often?

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Fri Jul 10, 2009 3:34 pm The Eva's aren't quite perfect copies. If they were, they'd have S2 Engines. I think it's reasonable to assume NERV tinkered with their genes just enough to make them incredibly powerful, but controllable, along with giving them slight differences in appearance as a side result. That's why Eva-00 has 1 eye, Eva-02 has four, Eva-03/04 has two and the harpies have none. Eva-01 doesn't count because she's the bastard child of Lillith.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Fri Jul 10, 2009 4:24 pm CyberXIII wrote: The Eva's aren't quite perfect copies. If they were, they'd have S2 Engines.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Jul 10, 2009 5:28 pm Each try gave them a different head, you can spot a lilin skull in there if you look carefully.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Fri Jul 10, 2009 5:40 pm ^I recall the 01 skull with an Angelic piece - have we actually seen this on 00, 02, etc.? The Mass Production series doesn't seem to have it.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Jul 10, 2009 6:43 pm I always took the Bardiel fleshmelding as an attempt to co-opt another Eva unit that failed for some unknown reason, but it's curious bardiel only attempted with 00.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:25 pm VoidEater wrote: CyberXIII wrote: The Eva's aren't quite perfect copies. If they were, they'd have S2 Engines.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 10, 2009 9:39 pm The Evas are probably all physically different from each other and Adam for the same reason Angels are different from each other and Adam; despite their DNA (or the PWM counterpart), the physical form is fickle and malleable.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jul 11, 2009 2:02 am AuraTwilight wrote: I felt it was pretty clear that Unit 00 was always the target because both it and it's pilot have Lilith's soul, which must "feel" like Adam's. Adam-ish body plus Adam-ish soul = MOMMY! Adam-ish body plus Kyoko or whoever the fuck = M-...mommy? Um... notice Iruel, the 11th Angel, infects the Test Body Eva that Rei was using first. Was that a perfect Adam clone too?

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Sat Jul 11, 2009 2:58 am maybe the difference is adam was an s2 engine, which would show why they froze unit 01 after it ingested it.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Jul 11, 2009 3:57 am According to a listing display shown on screen in one episode, Eva-00 actually has two eyes. And according to production drawing notes, both of the round things on top of her helmet are antennae of some sort.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Jul 12, 2009 12:52 pm You mean like radio thingys?

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Jul 12, 2009 1:22 pm Yeah. I forget the exact term used, I'd have to look it up again. But at any rate they would seem to be just equipment built into the helmet rather than anything that has any bearing on the anatomy of the head within.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Jul 12, 2009 1:38 pm CyberXIII wrote: 4)What about Eva-03 and 04?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Jul 13, 2009 11:53 am How many eye sockets in all those skulls in the Eva graveyard? And where are they placed? "Lens" = glass plate. There's one in the top of 00's head. Why? S2 = S2. Eva with an S2, no matter where from, how gathered, is an Eva with an S2. Recall SEELE's freak-out over 01 getting hers - still, contact between 01 and Angels brings no OMG, it's not an Angel/Adam contact. Manufactured Lances work pretty darn good, manufactured S2's as well. Eva's have no apparant Chamber of Guf, where souls are stored (to be sure, we don't see that Adam has one, but if he's a SoL and gives his offspring souls, he probably has one like Lilith). Eva's have no souls of their own. There's a distinct difference in placement on the food chain between Eva and SoL. Eva's are not SoL's, regardless of close relationship.
